blended.narrative: Big Sky is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,315 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 57".
